'''鈭歾h-zh-d''' ('''zhazhada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calumniate|calumniate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calumniate|calumniate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-zh-d
|-
! Lemma
| zhazhada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhazhadithi|zhazhadithi]] || [[word:zhazhadiji|zhazhadiji]] || [[word:zhazhadishi|zhazhadishi]] || [[word:zhazhadi|zhazhadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhaduthuth|zhazhaduthuth]] || [[word:zhazhadujuj|zhazhadujuj]] || [[word:zhazhadushush|zhazhadushush]] || [[word:zhazhad|zhazhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhaduthu|zhazhaduthu]] || [[word:zhazhaduju|zhazhaduju]] || [[word:zhazhadushu|zhazhadushu]] || [[word:zhazhadu|zhazhadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhadufuth|zhazhadufuth]] || [[word:zhazhadufuj|zhazhadufuj]] || [[word:zhazhadufush|zhazhadufush]] || [[word:zhazhaduf|zhazhaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhazhadethe|zhazhadethe]] || [[word:zhazhadeje|zhazhadeje]] || [[word:zhazhadeshe|zhazhadeshe]] || [[word:zhazhade|zhazhade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhadothoth|zhazhadothoth]] || [[word:zhazhadojoj|zhazhadojoj]] || [[word:zhazhadoshosh|zhazhadoshosh]] || [[word:zhazhad|zhazhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhadotho|zhazhadotho]] || [[word:zhazhadojo|zhazhadojo]] || [[word:zhazhadosho|zhazhadosho]] || [[word:zhazhado|zhazhado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhadofoth|zhazhadofoth]] || [[word:zhazhadofoj|zhazhadofoj]] || [[word:zhazhadofosh|zhazhadofosh]] || [[word:zhazhadof|zhazhadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhazhad忙th忙|zhazhad忙th忙]] || [[word:zhazhad忙j忙|zhazhad忙j忙]] || [[word:zhazhad忙sh忙|zhazhad忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhazhad忙|zhazhad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhadathath|zhazhadathath]] || [[word:zhazhadajaj|zhazhadajaj]] || [[word:zhazhadashash|zhazhadashash]] || [[word:zhazhad|zhazhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhadatha|zhazhadatha]] || [[word:zhazhadaja|zhazhadaja]] || [[word:zhazhadasha|zhazhadasha]] || [[word:zhazhada|zhazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhadafath|zhazhadafath]] || [[word:zhazhadafaj|zhazhadafaj]] || [[word:zhazhadafash|zhazhadafash]] || [[word:zhazhadaf|zhazhadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhazhadasha|zhazhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhazhadasha|gozhazhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhazhadasha|gokizhazhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhazhadn眉sha|zhazhadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkn眉sha|gozhazhadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhadn眉sha|gokizhazhadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhazhadsh毛sha|zhazhadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazhadnksh毛sha|gozhazhadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhazhadsh毛sha|gokizhazhadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhadrosha|zhazhadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkrosha|gozhazhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhadrosha|gokizhazhadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhadmusha|zhazhadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkmusha|gozhazhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhadmusha|gokizhazhadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhazhadsherasha|zhazhadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhazhadnksherasha|gozhazhadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhazhadsherasha|gokizhazhadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhazhadngasha|zhazhadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkngasha|gozhazhadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhazhadngasha|gokizhazhadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhazhadyasha|zhazhadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkyasha|gozhazhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhazhadyasha|gokizhazhadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhazhadyamasha|zhazhadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkyamasha|gozhazhadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhazhadyamasha|gokizhazhadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhazhadn眉sh毛sha|zhazhadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhazhadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhazhadn眉sh毛sha|gokizhazhadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhadn眉rosha|zhazhadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkn眉rosha|gozhazhadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhadn眉rosha|gokizhazhadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhadn眉musha|zhazhadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkn眉musha|gozhazhadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhadn眉musha|gokizhazhadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhazhadsh毛n眉sha|zhazhadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhadnksh毛n眉sha|gozhazhadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhadsh毛n眉sha|gokizhazhadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhadsh毛rosha|zhazhadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhadnksh毛rosha|gozhazhadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhadsh毛rosha|gokizhazhadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhadsh毛musha|zhazhadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhadnksh毛musha|gozhazhadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhadsh毛musha|gokizhazhadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhazhadron眉sha|zhazhadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkron眉sha|gozhazhadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhadron眉sha|gokizhazhadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhazhadrosh毛sha|zhazhadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkrosh毛sha|gozhazhadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhazhadrosh毛sha|gokizhazhadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhadromusha|zhazhadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkromusha|gozhazhadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhadromusha|gokizhazhadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhazhadmun眉sha|zhazhadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkmun眉sha|gozhazhadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhadmun眉sha|gokizhazhadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhazhadmush毛sha|zhazhadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkmush毛sha|gozhazhadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhazhadmush毛sha|gokizhazhadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhadmurosha|zhazhadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhadnkmurosha|gozhazhadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhadmurosha|gokizhazhadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhazhad|zhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙zh忙d|zh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhazhad|hozhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙zh忙d|hozh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhazhad|hohozhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙zh忙d|hohozh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhazhad|n眉zhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙zh忙d|n眉zh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhazhad|n眉n眉zhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙zh忙d|n眉n眉zh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhazhad|n茂zhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙zh忙d|n茂zh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhazhad|n茂n茂zhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙zh忙d|n茂n茂zh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhazhad|luzhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙zh忙d|luzh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhazhad|luluzhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙zh忙d|luluzh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhazhad|lizhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙zh忙d|lizh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhazhad|lilizhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙zh忙d|lilizh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhazhad|kozhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙zh忙d|kozh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhazhad|kokozhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙zh忙d|kokozh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhazhad|kezhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙zh忙d|kezh忙zh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhazhad|kekezhazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙zh忙d|kekezh忙zh忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
